zh.lifeSummary: 當Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl於1122年出生在英國瓦維其可爾金斯波利時，她的父親Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale48歲，母親Bethoc of Scotland42歲。她於1145年與Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale在蘇格蘭音巴內-爾巴登結婚。他們至少是6個兒子和2個女兒的父母。她去世於大約1182年在美國南達科他州傑克遜卡素享年61歲，埋葬在蘇格蘭培爾姆藍。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl于1122年出生在英国瓦維其可爾金斯波利时，她的父亲Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale48岁，母亲Bethoc of Scotland42岁。她于1145年与Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale在苏格兰音巴內-爾巴登结婚。他们至少是6个儿子和2个女儿的父母。她去世于大约1182年在美国南达科他州傑克遜卡素享年61岁，埋葬在苏格兰培爾姆藍。

nameMeanings.name: fitz
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
Altered form of English   Fitch  .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

variants.name: Fitzgerald
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Brendan, Eamon, Liam, Aidan, Bridgid, Caitlin, Donal, Fitz, Fitzgerald, Ciaran, Colum, Dermot.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gerald (see Gerald ), ‘son of Gerald’. This is a very common Anglo-Norman name in Ireland, where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Gearailt. Irish bearers of the name claim descent from Gerald Fitzwalter de Windsor, constable of Pembroke Castle in the early 12th century, whose grandson Raymond (or Redmond) ‘le Gros’ FitzGerald (died after 1185) led the invasion of Ireland on behalf of Strongbow in 1170. A branch of the family held the title Knight of Glin from at least 1299–2011.

variants.name: Fitzwater
meanings: Irish: altered form of Fitzwalter, a patronymic from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Walter , meaning ‘son of Walter’.

History: This is the name of a family of Norman origin, descended from Godfrey, Count of Brionne (died c. 1010). Godfrey's grandson, Richard FitzGilbert, accompanied William the Conqueror and was made Lord of Clare. His great-grandson was Robert FitzWalter, one of the barons who guaranteed the Magna Carta in 1215.

variants.name: Fitzherbert
meanings: English and Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Herbert (see Herbert ), ‘son of Herbert’.

variants.name: Fitzhenry
meanings: Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Henry (see Henry ), ‘son of Henry’. This surname is common in Ireland (mainly Connacht), where it has been Gaelicized as Mac Éinrí. In at least some cases, it seems to have been adopted as a surname indicating the illegitimate offspring of a man called Henry.

variants.name: Fitzsimmons
meanings: Irish and English: variant of Fitzsimon, with post-medieval excrescent -s, from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + either of the personal names Simon or Sigmund (see Simon ), ‘son of Simon or Sigmund’. The name is also found in the Gaelicized form Mac Síomóin.

variants.name: Fitzgibbon
meanings: Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Gibbon, a Norman French pet form of Gilbert ; ‘son of Gibbon’. This name has long been a widespread and important surname in Ireland, and Gaelicized as Mac Giobúin. Sir Gilbert (Gibbon) FitzJohn, illegitimate son of John FitzGerald, 1st Baron Desmond (died 1261), was the ancestor of a line of Anglo-Norman aristocracy in Ireland, who acquired the surname Fitzgibbon with reference to him. Gilbert and his Fitzgibbon descendants were known as ‘the White Knights’ on account of their fair complexion.

variants.name: Fitzharris
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aileen.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Harry ‘son of Harry’. MacLysaght describes this as the name of a distinguished County Wexford family, also known as Fitzhenry .

variants.name: Fitzmaurice
meanings: Some characteristic forenames:  Irish Aidan, Ciaran, Colm.

Irish: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Maurice (see Morris 1), ‘son of Maurice’. This surname is common in Ireland, where it has also been Gaelicized as Mac Muiris. The Irish family of Fitzmaurice share a common Norman ancestry with the Fitzgerald family. They can be traced to Thomas Fitzmaurice, whose brother Gerald was the ancestor of the Irish Fitzgerald dynasty. Their father was Maurice Fitzgerald, a Norman baron (died 1176).

variants.name: Fitzhugh
meanings: English (Northamptonshire): from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (see Fitz ) + the personal name Hugh (see Hugh ), ‘son of Hugh’.

History: William Fitzhugh (1651–1701), from Bedford, England, emigrated to VA c. 1670 and established himself on the Potomac River in what was then Stafford County, VA, as a planter and exporter. He also practiced law, was a member of the Virginia House of Burgesses, and served in 1687 as lieutenant colonel of the county militia.

variants.name: Fitzroy
meanings: English: from Anglo-Norman French fi(t)z ‘son’ (from Latin filius), used originally to distinguish a son from a father bearing the same personal name and then conventionalized as a hereditary surname, or short for a surname of which fiz ‘son’ was the first element, for example Fitzhenry and Fitzroy .
Altered form of English   Fitch  .
German: from a vernacular pet form of the personal name Vinzenz (see Vincent ) or Vitus (see Vito , compare Veit ). Compare also Fietz .

en.lifeSummary: When Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl was born in 1122, in Kingsbury, Warwickshire, England, her father, Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale, was 48 and her mother, Bethoc of Scotland, was 42. She married Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale in 1145, in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland. They were the parents of at least 6 sons and 2 daughters. She died about 1182, in Castle, Jackson, South Dakota, United States, at the age of 61, and was buried in Moulin, Perthshire, Scotland.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl est née en 1122, à Kingsbury, Warwickshire, Angleterre, son père, Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale, avait 48 ans et sa mère, Bethoc of Scotland, avait 42 ans. Elle a épousé Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale en 1145, à Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Écosse. Ils ont eu au moins 6 fils et 2 filles. Elle est décédée environ 1182, à Castle, Jackson, Dakota du Sud, États-Unis, à l’âge de 61 ans, et a été enterrée à Moulin, Perthshire, Écosse.

de.lifeSummary: Als Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl 1122 in Kingsbury, Warwickshire, England geboren wurde, war ihr Vater Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale 48 und ihre Mutter Bethoc of Scotland 42. Sie hat 1145 in Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 6 Söhne und 2 Töchter. Sie starb um 1182 im Alter von 61 Jahren in Castle, Jackson, South Dakota, Vereinigte Staaten und wurde in Moulin, Perthshire, Scotland begraben.

Lei sposato Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale nel 1145, nel Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Erano genitori di almeno 6 figli e 2 figlie. ja.lifeSummary: Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Athollが1122年にイギリスワーウィクシュアイアキングスブリーで生まれた時，父Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedaleは48歳，母Bethoc of Scotlandは42歳であった。1145年にスコットランドインバーネス-シュアイアバデノチでRichard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedaleと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも6人の息子と2人の娘の親であった。彼女は約1182年にアメリカ合衆国サウスダコタ州ジャクソンカストルで61歳で死去し，スコットランドペルスシュアイアモウリンにて埋葬された。

ko.lifeSummary: Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl(이)가 1122년 영국 워윅실르 킨그스버이에서 태어났을 때, 그녀의 아버지 Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale(은)는 48세였고, 그녀의 어머니 Bethoc of Scotland(은)는 42세였다. 그녀는 1145년 스컷랜드 인버네스-실르 바데노치에서 Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 여섯 명의 아들과 두 명의 딸을 두었다. 그녀는 대략 1182년 미국 사우스다코타 주 잭슨 카스틀에서 61세의 나이로 사망했으며 스컷랜드 퍼스실르 모우린에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl nasceu em 1122, em Kingsbury, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale, tinha 48 anos e sua mãe, Bethoc of Scotland, tinha 42 anos. Ela casou-se com Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale em 1145, em Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Eles tiveram pelo menos 6 filhos e 2 filhas. Ela faleceu aproximadamente 1182, em Castle, Jackson, Dacota do Sul, Estados Unidos da América, com 61 anos, e foi sepultada em Moulin, Perthshire, Scotland.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl родилась в 1122 г. в местности кингсбури, варвиккшир, Англия, её отцу по имени Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale было 48 лет, а матери, которую звали Bethoc of Scotland, 42. Она вышла замуж за человека по имени Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale в 1145 г. в местности баденох, инвирнесс-шир, Шотландия. У них было по крайней мере 6 сыновей и 2 дочери. Она умерла около 1182 г. в местности кастл, джекксон, Южная Дакота, Соединенные штаты в возрасте 61 год и была похоронена в местности моулинь, пиртшир, Шотландия.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando Hextilda fitz Uchtred Countess Of Atholl nació en 1122, en Kingsbury, Warwickshire, Inglaterra, su papá, Uchtred FitzWaldeve Lord of Tynedale, tenía 48 años y su mamá, Bethoc of Scotland, tenía 42 años. Se casó con Richard De Comyn Lord Of Tynedale en 1145, en Badenoch, Inverness-shire, Scotland. Fueron padres de por lo menos 6 hijos y 2 hijas. Murió aproximadamente 1182, en Castle, Jackson, Dakota del Sur, Estados Unidos, a la edad de 61 años, y fue sepultada en Moulin, Perthshire, Scotland.
